title: Fix RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter for generic labels like User123

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started reproduction for integration failure in test_remove_speaker_identifiers_various_formats. Will inspect expected patterns and update filter regex accordingly, then rerun targeted tests.

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Extended RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter to also remove generic speaker labels like 'User123:' at turn boundaries (start/newline/after period+space), while preserving the existing explicit speaker-label handling. Added unit test coverage for User123 format. Validation: .                                                                        [100%]
